name: aicoe-skills
description: Internal skill marketplace for the Trilogy AI Center of Excellence. Install CoE-authored Agent Skills into Claude Code, Cowork, and any SKILL.md-compatible runtime.

plugins.name: ai-usage-assessment
plugins.description: Guided self-assessment that captures how a person uses AI — tools, providers, models, and access paths — then auto-submits a structured report to the AI CoE.

plugins.name: coe-skill-template
plugins.description: Canonical template and worked example for authoring a Trilogy AI CoE skill. Copy this folder to start a new skill.
